name: schema-form-platform
author: yangdongnan
description: Schema 驱动的可视化自由布局设计器与渲染器 — 支持 qiankun 微前端接入与 microapp 下层集成

scripts.dev: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && pnpm dev:server & sleep 3 && pnpm --parallel --filter @schema-form/editor-web --filter @schema-form/flow-web --filter @schema-form/ai-app --filter @schema-form/portal dev
scripts.dev:server: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pnpm extract:ai-metadata && pnpm --filter @schema-form/server dev
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm build:server && pnpm build:editor && pnpm build:flow && pnpm build:ai && pnpm build:portal && mkdir -p packages/portal/dist/editor && cp -r packages/editor/web/dist/* packages/portal/dist/editor/ && mkdir -p packages/portal/dist/flow && cp -r packages/flow/web/dist/* packages/portal/dist/flow/ && mkdir -p packages/portal/dist/ai && cp -r packages/ai-app/dist/* packages/portal/dist/ai/
